Start earning this month →
Simple process

Up and running in under 5 minutes.

01
Sign up, instantly
Visit the YTGrowth affiliate portal, create a free account, and your unique tracking link is generated immediately. No application form, no waiting for approval, no minimum follower requirement.
02
Share your link
Drop it in a YouTube video description, a newsletter, a tweet, a community post, or a pinned comment. The best-converting placements are honest tool recommendations in your regular content, not dedicated review videos.
03
Earn every single month
Whenever someone you referred pays their subscription, month after month, or in one annual lump, 30% lands in your affiliate balance. Withdraw at any time once you clear $50.

Real affiliates

Results from creators already earning.

$340/mo recurring

"I mentioned YTGrowth in one video, not even a dedicated review, just a passing recommendation in a tools roundup. Six months later I am still collecting recurring commissions from that single video. That has never happened with any other affiliate program I have promoted."

Marcus T.
Tech & Productivity · 42K subscribers
$510/mo recurring

"The 30% recurring rate is genuinely the best I have seen in the YouTube tools space. VidIQ and TubeBuddy both offer one-time or lower-rate commissions. With YTGrowth I make more per referral, and I keep making it every single month. It is passive income that compounds."

Priya Nair
Personal Finance · 28K subscribers
$890/mo recurring

"I run a YouTube coaching business and I send every new client through my affiliate link. It practically offsets my own subscription cost within the first few referrals, and the ongoing commissions have become a meaningful line item in my monthly income."

James Oduya
YouTube Coach · 67K subscribers
FAQ

Every question answered.

If something is not covered here, email support@ytgrowth.io, we reply same day.

What is the commission rate and does it really recur?+

You earn 30% of every payment your referrals make, not just the first one. If someone subscribes to the Growth plan at $49/month and stays for two years, you earn 30% of every single renewal for the full two years. Annual plans count too. There is no cliff, no cap, and no expiry on an active customer.

How long does the tracking cookie last?+
Do I need to be a paying YTGrowth customer to join?+
Is there an approval process or minimum audience size?+
What happens if my referral cancels and resubscribes later?+
How and when do I get paid?+
Can I use paid advertising to promote my affiliate link?+
How do I track my clicks, conversions, and earnings?+
Does the 30% apply to one-time purchases and annual plans too?+
What marketing materials are available?+

Grow on YouTube with data, not guesswork.
